title: begonia × mutabilis
intro: Begonia × mutabilis, also known as the changeable begonia, is a hybrid plant species resulting from the cross between Begonia semiovata and Begonia cucullata. This plant is known for its unique leaves that change color depending on the light exposure, ranging from green to reddish-brown. The Begonia × mutabilis plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, making it useful in treating wounds and skin infections. Additionally, the plant's leaves can be used to make herbal preparations such as teas and infusions, which are believed to provide health benefits like reducing fever and alleviating digestive issues.
